data.name: Skyeye Team at MBZIRC 2020: A team of aerial and ground robots for GPS-denied autonomous fire extinguishing in an urban building scenario

data.description: Skyeye Team at MBZIRC 2020: A team of aerial and ground robots for GPS-denied autonomous fire extinguishing in an urban building scenario discusses Digital Twin.
Skyeye Team at MBZIRC 2020: A team of aerial and ground robots for GPS-denied autonomous fire extinguishing in an urban building scenario uses Gazebo.
Skyeye Team at MBZIRC 2020: A team of aerial and ground robots for GPS-denied autonomous fire extinguishing in an urban building scenario uses ROS 2 Middleware.
